rulings.Case Title: LEONILA MORTENSEN, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Deft Union Pacific Railroad Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition, And To Extend The Close Of Discovery With Respect To Union Pacific Railroad Company
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 17, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Plaintiffs' motion to compel defendant Union Pacific Railroad Co. to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition, and to extend close of discovery with respect to Union Pacific Railroad Co. is continued to October 24 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONILA MORTENSEN, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 17, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Defendant Union Pacific Railroad Co.¿s motion for protective order is continued to October 24 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)
